friend_activities.name: Users can view activities from followed users
friend_activities.check: is_visible = TRUE AND (user_id = auth.uid() OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM public.follows WHERE follower_id = auth.uid() AND following_id = user_id) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM public.activity_feed_subscriptions WHERE subscriber_user_id = auth.uid() AND publisher_user_id = user_id AND is_active = TRUE))

friend_activities.name: Users can insert their own activities
Users can update their own activities

activity_feed_subscriptions.name: Users can view their own subscriptions
Users can manage their own subscriptions

place_recommendations.name: Users can view their own recommendations
Users can update their own recommendations

user_interactions.name: Users can insert their own interactions
